title: Placemats And Coasters Set of 4 Of Each With Wipe Clean Finish With Corked Back For Dinner & Dining Room Table (William Morris Lodden)
features: Festive Tableware: This set includes 4 place mats and coasters featuring various themes. Placemats measure : 29cm x 22cm. Coasters : 11cm x 11cm.
Durable Construction: The place mats and coasters are crafted from a cork backing.
Easy Care: These table accessories are low-maintenance and can be easily cleaned.
Versatile Design: The place mats and coasters complement various table settings and decors.
Thoughtful Gift: This set makes an excellent present for loved ones during the holiday season.
description: Bring the beauty into your home with this set of four dinner place mats and coasters featuring charming scenes. These table accessories are perfect for creating a warm and inviting atmosphere during the holiday season or for every day use. The place mats and coasters are made from high-quality materials, ensuring durability and easy cleaning. The vibrant colours and intricate details of the designs will add a touch of whimsy to your dining table. Whether you're hosting a family gathering or a cosy dinner party, this set will enhance the ambience and make your guests feel truly welcomed. Elevate your table setting with these delightful place mats and coasters, and let the magic of the season unfold.
